description: You are a sound designer for the 'Haunted Asylum' escape room. Create a dual-channel audio puzzle in the Ardour session 'MyProject' by configuring two tracks named 'Hidden Message' and 'Gramophone'. Import /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav to the 'Hidden Message' track, trimmed to 10 seconds, reversed, and offset to start at 5.0 seconds on the timeline. Import /home/ga/Audio/samples/moonlight_sonata.wav to the 'Gramophone' track starting at 0.0 seconds. Pan 'Hidden Message' 100% Left and 'Gramophone' 100% Right. Add a session location marker named 'Clue Start' at the 5.0-second mark. Export the final stereo session as a WAV file to /home/ga/Audio/escape_room/puzzle_clue.wav. A brief is also available at /home/ga/Audio/escape_room/puzzle_brief.txt.
